codexInstruction.title: P35/P47 UI-DX Gantt data addendum from Mallory MR0.0.3 SW Gate0 Review
codexInstruction.sourceDocument: Mallory Digital Project MR0.0.3 SW Gate0 Review.pdf
codexInstruction.implementationRule: DATA ONLY UPDATE. Do not alter visual styling, colours, typography, layout density, expansion width, dark/orange treatment, milestone styling, spacing, scroll behaviour or component hierarchy. Only add/adjust workstreams, accountability metadata, tooltips, status flags and requirement/workstream data.
codexInstruction.uxOwnerRule: Do not populate UX owners. Jymy / UX lane remains separate and should be left blank or marked TBC only where the existing app already supports that.
codexInstruction.uiOwnerRule: UI-DX owner metadata may be added only as data/tooltips/workstream ownership. Do not merge UI and UX responsibility.

gate0DefinitionOfDone: Requirement for new or modified function reaches Open or Defined status.
Epic for carry-over function reaches Open status.
Complete carry-over Epic creation and fill specific information in the VDR system.

mr003ProgrammeAnchor.gate0Status: Reviewed/pass at VFT Gate0 review, but Digital Cockpit delivery scope is not aligned and contains major dependencies.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: DC delivery scope alignment
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Track as the primary PF2.0 UI-DX risk workstream. Add status/risk flag rather than redesigning the Gantt.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.gateDependency: Must be clarified before SW G1 because UX/UI negotiated wireframes and NIO handoff depend on this.
sourceFacts: Delivery scope was not aligned at Gate0.
Many DC tickets are placeholders and may not be deliverable in MR0.0.3.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: DC scope not aligned; tickets include placeholders. Clarify deliverable vs mitigation before G1.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: Screen interim solution decision
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Add a dependency marker only; do not change chart styling. Use as a risk/dependency tooltip or vertical marker.
dependencies: IC interim route: use NIO RCP as mitigation?
ICS interim route: use QinLing ICS or NT3 Cetus ICS?
Screen hardware not available / not confirmed.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: Screen interim solution unresolved. IC/ICS mitigation choice affects UI implementation path and NIO handoff.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: PRD / UXUI availability risk
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Represent as risk metadata attached to PF2.0 G1, not as a visual redesign.
sourceFacts: PRD/UXUI availability was listed as a blocker/reason DC scope may not deliver in MR0.0.3.
Third party software such as Voice Assistant SDK was also listed as a blocker.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: G1 wireframe/spec delivery is compromised if PRD/UXUI and third-party inputs are not available.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: Body Control screens & switches UI support
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Add as a cross-domain controls/switches workstream. Keep grouped with physical controls/hardpoints; do not create one tiny bar per switch.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: Body Control has 28 created requirements; several Screens & Switches records have DC/HMI impact and should be grouped with controls/hardpoints.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: Thermal & Energy UI touchpoints
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Track UI-facing energy/range/charging/status surfaces only; do not assume full thermal software ownership.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: Thermal & Energy has 27 requirements. UI-DX should track visible energy, range and charging surfaces without taking functional ownership.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: Motion / cluster / powertrain surfaces
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Group with cluster/driver display and controls. Do not split tachometer, speed, gear, TPMS, mode and powertrain status randomly.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: Motion has 28 requirements. UI-DX impact is concentrated around cluster, drive modes, gear, TPMS and vehicle-state display surfaces.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: Connectivity / DCL / vehicle status UI touchpoints
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Add low-medium priority UI touchpoint workstream. Only visible states, settings or status surfaces need UI-DX input.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: CT has 8 Epic VDRs. UI-DX should track only visible connectivity, vehicle status and event-reporting surfaces.

newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.label: Infrastructure / vehicle moding / diagnostic status touchpoints
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.uiDxAccountability: Add as UI dependency metadata for visible diagnostic/flashing/network/vehicle-mode states. Do not make it a core UI design bar unless app already supports dependency-only tasks.
newUxUiRelevantWorkstreams.tooltipNote: Infrastructure has 1 epic and 24 requirements. UI impact is mainly visible diagnostic, network, LV power and vehicle-mode state handling.

globalGanttRulesForThisAddendum: Render workstreams as grouped bars or metadata, not one bar per requirement.
Do not change colours/styling. Reuse existing colour tokens/classes only.
Do not add new visual design language.
If new categories require colour, map to existing palette rather than adding new colours.
Put risk and function owners in tooltip/detail panel where possible.
PF2.0 G1 remains the critical UI-DX definition deadline for NIO handoff.
DC scope alignment and screen interim solution should be visibly flagged as high-risk dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing Gantt visual styling is unchanged.
New workstreams/accountability appear as data only.
MR0.0.3 DC scope risk is represented.
Screen interim solution risk is represented.
Function owners are present in metadata/tooltips.
No UX owner is assigned by Codex.
Build/lint is run if available and changed files are summarised.
